steps.title: Look for the shared outcome
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between Greenland's glaciers and icebergs. The notes show that both melt and both contribute to rising sea levels, even though their melting rates depend on different temperature factors.

steps.title: Reject one-sided or contrastive options
steps.content: Choice A focuses only on icebergs. Choice C uses unlike and highlights a difference in what controls melting rate. Choice D discusses only glaciers and water temperature. The sentence that names both glaciers and icebergs and gives their shared effect fits the goal. The answer is B.
